PRETRIAL MOTION, DEPT. 212, MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF SANCTION. PLAINTIFF CHRISTINA GOMEZ'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF SANCTION ISSUED ON 10/18/04 TO DANIEL MARK SIEGEL, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE AND NO OBJECTION, THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY TO PROPOSED SUBMIT ORDER WITHIN 5 DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: YVONNE LEE # 5616 (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2004 Off Calendar

Motion For Reconsideration Of Sanction
Off Calendar Nov-18-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Christina Gomez's motion for reconsideration of sanction issued on 10/18/04 to Daniel Mark Siegel, Esq., in the amount of $350.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance and no objection, the court's tentative ruling to grant plaintiff's motion is adopted. Motion is granted. Moving party to proposed submit order within 5 days. Proceedings reported by: Yvonne Lee # 5616 (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2004 Continued To Dec-20-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 12/20/2004 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Lois Jones. (212)
